nasb.text: The name of the first is Pishon; it flows around the whole land of Havilah, where there is gold.

esv.text: The name of the first is the Pishon. It is the one that flowed around the whole land of Havilah, where there is gold.

cnv.text: 第一道河名叫比遜，就是環繞哈腓拉全地的，在那裡有金子；

ccb.text: 第一条支流叫比逊河，它环绕着哈腓拉全境。那里有金子，

csbs.text: 第一条名叫比逊，它围绕着哈腓拉全地，在那里有金子，
